# Significant Hobbies

> Life planner for private daily rituals and public living — hobbies, bucket lists, and side quests over time.

## Product

- [Home](https://significanthobbies.com/): Product landing
- [Explore](https://significanthobbies.com/explore): Public hobby timelines


## Free tools & funnels

- [Tools hub](https://significanthobbies.com/tools): Calculators and helpers
- [Time calculator](https://significanthobbies.com/tools/time-calculator): Hobby time cost
- [Cost calculator](https://significanthobbies.com/tools/cost-calculator): Hobby budget
- [Find your hobby](https://significanthobbies.com/find-your-hobby): Guided discovery
- [Get started](https://significanthobbies.com/get-started): Onboarding
- [Compare hobbies](https://significanthobbies.com/compare): Side-by-side
- [Starter kits](https://significanthobbies.com/starter-kits)
- [Life bingo](https://significanthobbies.com/life-bingo)
- [Bucket list ideas](https://significanthobbies.com/bucket-list-ideas)

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://significanthobbies.com/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://significanthobbies.com/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://significanthobbies.com/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
